entry.title: Monday adapter & Zoho `closeTicket` Updates
entry.summary: New Monday.com adapter docs, and an updated Zoho closeTicket that now writes the chat transcript as a Note on the contact.
entry.content:
New Monday.com adapter docs, and an updated Zoho closeTicket that now writes the chat transcript as a Note on the contact.

Added​

  • Monday.com adapter — full documentation for the new Monday adapter: getCustomerDetails, createItem, updateItem, changeStatus, and crmGetFields. Covers the required crmConfig (authToken, boardId, groupId, phoneColumnId, statusColumnId, workspaceUrl), column-ID vs. column-title gotchas, per-column-type value formats (status, dropdown, date, phone, email, text), phone-format flags (useNationalDigits / useFullPhoneNumber), and the additionalFieldsQuery / additionalFieldsVariables hooks for pulling extra item columns onto crmData.

Improved​

  • Zoho closeTicket — now writes the chat transcript as a Note on the contact by default (Zoho Create Notes API), using a new stable crmData.contactId so the note always lands on the original contact even after later createRecord / updateRecord calls move recordId to another module. The record PUT only runs when there's something to update (crmConfig.closeTicketDateField set, or YAML params passed) — no more spurious updates on agent-resolved chats. New crmConfig options: disableCloseTicketNote to opt out of the note, and closeTicketNoteTitle to override the note-title prefix (default שיחת ווצאפ).

entry.title: Ask AI — Docs Chat
entry.summary: Ask natural-language questions about Texter right inside the docs. A new right-docked chat panel, grounded in the full documentation, is now live on every page.
entry.content:
Ask natural-language questions about Texter right inside the docs. A new right-docked chat panel, grounded in the full documentation, is now live on every page.

Added​

  • Ask AI panel — click the "Ask AI" button in the bottom-right to open a chat that answers questions about YAML, adapters, scenarios, bot flows, and anything else covered in the docs. Works in both English and Hebrew.
  • Source citations — every answer lists the docs pages it drew from, as clickable links that take you straight to the relevant reference.
  • Multi-turn follow-ups — the panel remembers your conversation within the session so you can ask follow-ups like "and for Zoho?" without restating context.
  • "Ask about this page" — one-click prompt in the empty state that asks the AI to summarize the page you're currently on, the key YAML points to follow, and common mistakes to avoid.
  • Prompt suggestions — the empty state surfaces three rotating starter questions drawn from a pool of 30, covering data injection, Flows, adapters, prompts, notifies, working hours, and more.
  • YAML answers ready to paste — YAML code blocks in answers are auto-indented by two spaces so you can paste them directly under an existing key in the bot editor.
  • Resizable panel — drag the left edge to widen or narrow the panel; your preferred width is remembered across sessions.

entry.title: Giscus Comments, Template Webhooks, and Passive Marketing Chats
entry.summary: New this week: comments on every docs page, three subscribe-to-events templates for template messaging and assignment webhooks, and a scheduled scenario for recovering passive bulk chats.
entry.content:
New this week: comments on every docs page, three subscribe-to-events templates for template messaging and assignment webhooks, and a scheduled scenario for recovering passive bulk chats.

Added​

  • Comments on every page — each docs page and scenario card now has a comment section powered by Giscus, backed by GitHub Discussions. Use it to ask questions, share your own scenario variations, post real-world examples, or discuss edge cases with the community.

  • (SUB) Chat Unsubscribed — sends a webhook when a chat opts out of template messages (for example when the customer replies with an opt-out keyword such as "הסר"). Use it to sync suppression lists or update consent in external systems.

  • (SUB) Chat Subscribed — sends a webhook when a chat subscribes or opts back in to receiving template messages, so you can refresh consent or resume outreach elsewhere.

  • (SUB) Chat Assigned — sends a webhook when a chat is taken by an agent, including the full chat and a narrowed agent profile (id, crmId, email, displayName, roles) for CRMs, routing tools, or custom backends.

  • Handle Passive Marketing Chats — cron-triggered scenario that runs once a day, finds BULK chats from the previous day whose last message matched one of your marketing templates, and automatically reassigns them to the sales department (Pending status) while updating the lead's status in Rapid CRM. Built for Tyntec provider customers — see the "What to configure" section for the expression to use with other WhatsApp providers.

entry.title: Google Sheet Adapter
entry.summary: New Google Sheet adapter docs — look up customers from a CSV file hosted in Google Drive.
entry.content:
New Google Sheet adapter docs — look up customers from a CSV file hosted in Google Drive.

Added​

  • Google Sheet adapter — full documentation for getCustomerDetails (and its getCustomerDetailsCSV alias), including phone-based and ID-based lookups, filterField/filterValue narrowing, the crmConfig field mapping (customers_csv_*), how the 10-minute refresh works, how to update the customer list (upload a new CSV — don't edit in place), and supported phone formats

entry.title: End-of-Day Closing Message Scenario
entry.summary: A new scheduled scenario added to the marketplace for closing out pending chats at the end of the business day.
entry.content:
A new scheduled scenario added to the marketplace for closing out pending chats at the end of the business day.

Added​

  • End-of-Day Closing Message — cron-triggered scenario that finds pending chats with activity in the last ~9 hours and sends a closing message letting customers know they'll get a response on the next business day. Configurable per customer via a ScenariosCustomTriggerCronTask entry in Nihul (e.g. Sun–Thu at 18:30), excludes chats already labeled waiting_for_customer, and sends up to 10 messages concurrently.

entry.title: Scenario Marketplace
entry.summary: Browse, understand, and copy ready-made automation scenarios directly into Texter — no starting from scratch.
entry.content:
Browse, understand, and copy ready-made automation scenarios directly into Texter — no starting from scratch.

Added​

  • Scenario Marketplace — new top-level section in the docs site at /scenarios
  • 18 scenarios across trigger types, action types, and integrations, including:
    • Subscribe-to-events templates (incoming messages, chat assigned/resolved, message status, external bot, scheduled, channel health)
    • Q-AI suite — turn on/off AI sessions, forward messages to an AI webhook, end sessions and run a fallback bot
    • Salesforce CRM — create and update service requests on chat events
    • Utility — assign by echo message, label on message error, notify on assignment, forward delivery status
  • Tag filtering — filter by trigger type, action type, or integration (e.g. ai-bot, salesforce, webhook)
  • Search — full-text search across scenario name, description, tags, and trigger events
  • Per-card flow strip — visual trigger → action icon flow at the top of each card; hover an icon to see its label
  • "What to configure" section — collapsible per-scenario guide showing exactly which fields to replace, where they live in the JSON, and whether they're required
  • Copy JSON — one click copies the full scenario JSON to clipboard, ready to paste into Texter
  • Randomized ordering — cards shuffle on each page load so no scenario is always buried at the bottom

entry.title: Plando Adapter + Docs Fixes
entry.summary: New Plando CRM adapter docs and a round of fixes and additions across existing pages.
entry.content:
New Plando CRM adapter docs and a round of fixes and additions across existing pages.

Added​

  • Plando adapter — full documentation for getCustomerDetails, newOpportunity, openTicket/closeTicket, and out-of-adapter endpoints (log_activity, upload_contact_file)
  • log_activity — expanded with all supported API fields including contact identification options, record fields, and response handling
  • Send Media — added dynamic URL tip (workaround for editor validation when using data injection in doc:/media:) and a line breaks in captions example

Fixed​

  • Prompt Text — corrected optional param name from delay_on_complete to delay_complete_seconds

entry.title: Senzey & Lead.IM Adapters + Docs Improvements
entry.summary: Two new CRM adapter docs, new transformers, and a round of clarity improvements across the docs.
entry.content:
Two new CRM adapter docs, new transformers, and a round of clarity improvements across the docs.

Added​

  • Senzey adapter — full documentation
  • Lead.IM adapter — full documentation
  • New transformers - get, omit, pick, documented in the Data Injection / Transformers page
  • working_time schedule table - allowed days & hours formats documented in Check Working Hours
  • Diagrams - added visual diagrams to more complex nodes and flows

Improved​

  • Share File moved to the System functions category (was Utils)
  • Powerlink, Rapid, Tazman, Zoho adapter pages cleaned up

entry.title: Powerlink (Fireberry) CRM Adapter
entry.summary: Full documentation for the Powerlink (Fireberry) CRM adapter is now available.
entry.content:
Full documentation for the Powerlink (Fireberry) CRM adapter is now available.

Added​

  • Powerlink (Fireberry) CRM adapter — full documentation with configuration, field mapping, and YAML examples

entry.title: Zoho CRM Adapter
entry.summary: Full documentation for the Zoho CRM adapter is now available.
entry.content:
Full documentation for the Zoho CRM adapter is now available.

Added​

  • Zoho CRM adapter — full documentation with field mapping, configuration, and YAML examples

Improved​

  • Feedback widget now shows a success toast after submission
  • Keyword Route node docs clarified
  • Tazman adapter page cleaned up

entry.title: Tazman CRM Adapter + Feedback Widget
entry.summary: New Tazman CRM adapter docs, an expanded Markdown examples reference, and a feedback widget on every page.
entry.content:
New Tazman CRM adapter docs, an expanded Markdown examples reference, and a feedback widget on every page.

Added​

  • Tazman CRM adapter — full documentation with configuration examples
  • Feedback widget — appears on every page, lets users report issues or request clarification. Submissions open tasks for the Texter team
  • Markdown Examples page — greatly expanded with detailed examples covering all supported syntax

Fixed​

  • Feedback form submit button is now disabled until all required fields are filled
  • Various clarifications and corrections in Rapid adapter docs

entry.title: Documentation Site Live — Full YAML Reference + Rapid Adapter
entry.summary: The Texter documentation site is now live with complete YAML bot configuration reference and the first CRM adapter docs.
entry.content:
The Texter documentation site is now live with complete YAML bot configuration reference and the first CRM adapter docs.

Added​

YAML Node Types

  • Choice and Text prompt nodes
  • Notify and Send Media notify nodes
  • WhatsApp Flow node
  • System functions: Bot State Split, Check Working Hours, Format Date, Keyword Route, Match Expression, Noop, Parse CRM Data, Request, Send Mail, Send Webhook, Set Language, Store Value, Switch Node
  • Chat functions: Add Label, External Bot, Sensitive Session
  • Utility functions: Match Values, Random Code, Share File

Data Injection

  • YAML Overview
  • Data Injection: Overview, Legacy Syntax, Providers, and Transformers
  • Bot Configuration reference

Adapters

  • Adapters section with Overview page
  • Full Rapid CRM adapter documentation

Site

  • Full-text local search
  • Last updated timestamps on every page
